wiki.summary: Previewed at Rolling Loud Orlando on May 10th, 2026 This song shares the same instrumental as “girl” by 2hollis. While 2hollis does not deliver a traditional vocal verse on the track, he is formally credited as a featured artist due to the production he did on the song’s instrumental. Read more on Last.fm.
